scenario: NEEDS MANUAL REVIEW — Borderline turnover from poor-quality scanned documents. OCR confidence too low to trust.

financials.notes: All financial documents are low-quality scans. Faded ink, some pages slightly crumpled before scanning. OCR will struggle.

fy_2023_24.notes: One digit is unclear — could be 5,10,00,000 or 5,18,00,000 or 5,1_,00,000. The comma placement suggests Indian format but the second digit after 1 is smudged.

fy_2024_25.notes: Third digit is completely unreadable — could be 4,80 or 4,85 or 4,89. Faded ink.

fy_2025_26.notes: Most legible of the three but still below reliable threshold.

turnover.threshold_proximity: Within 2% of Rs. 5 Cr threshold — borderline

ca_certificate.notes: Last digit before 'Crore' is unreadable. Could be 5.06, 5.07, 5.08, or even 5.00.

similar_works.project: Construction of Type-II Quarters at PAC Lines, Lucknow
similar_works.notes: State police force, not central. Does it count as 'Central Govt, State Govt, or PSU'? Yes — State Govt qualifies per tender definition.

similar_works.project: Office Building for District Collectorate, Varanasi

similar_works.notes: Certificate is a poor scan. The project value could be Rs. 2,10,00,000 or Rs. 2,18,00,000 — last digit before zeros is unclear. Either way, it exceeds Rs. 2 Cr.

emd.in_favour_of: Commandant, Group Centre, CRPF, New Delhi

criteria.turnover: NEEDS REVIEW — Best estimate is Rs. 5.07 Cr (marginally above Rs. 5 Cr) but OCR confidence is 0.53-0.67 across years. Cannot confirm with certainty whether the bidder meets the threshold. CA certificate is also poorly scanned.
criteria.net_worth: ELIGIBLE (probable) — Appears positive but low OCR confidence
criteria.similar_works: ELIGIBLE — 3 qualifying works with certificates, all government projects. One certificate's value is slightly unclear but exceeds threshold either way.

expected_verdict.notes: The OCR nightmare scenario. Everything hinges on whether the turnover figures can be verified. System should flag for manual review with original scan images, NOT auto-reject.
